reason: Stablecoin contraction and significant selling by a major holder (Vitalik Buterin) indicate underlying market weakness and potential for further downside, despite a short-term Bitcoin bounce. Mixed signals on broader market sentiment and liquidity suggest high volatility and caution. Institutional adoption provides long-term optimism but doesn't negate immediate risks.
headlines: Leading stablecoin Tether shrinks again as market cap looks set for second straight monthly drop
Vitalik Buterin sold 17,000 ETH this month as ether fell 37%
Crypto firm with U.S. bank charter holds bitcoin holder Strategy's preferred stock
Dogecoin jumps 5% as breakout flips resistance into support
Bitcoin bounces above $65,000 as dollar weakens and bullish hopes build
